extract: Thunder Wave (Japanese: でんじは Electromagnetic Wave) is a non-damaging Electric-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM45 in Generation I. TM73 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM16 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM14 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM082 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM008 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
